option.name: originalContent
option.value:
JU.
About Skills Approach Projects Certifications Experience Contact

QA AUTOMATION • DATA ENGINEERING • FINTECH

Jimmy Unelus

Senior QA Automation Engineer

I help teams ship with confidence by building scalable test automation, API/data quality checks, and CI gates that reduce release risk in FinTech and regulated environments.

View Projects Request Resume GitHub LinkedIn

Open to Senior QA Automation, SDET, and QA/Data hybrid roles.

0

Years Experience

0

Automation Workstreams Delivered

0

Core Platforms Supported

About Me

I’m a Senior QA Automation and Data Engineer with 10+ years of experience across FinTech, media, and regulated environments. I specialize in Playwright, PyTest, Selenium, API testing, SQL, Airflow, CI/CD, and cloud-based test/data reliability.

Technical Expertise

🤖

QA Automation

Selenium WebDriver, Playwright, PyTest, Rest Assured, Cucumber BDD

</>

Languages

Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL, Bash, C#

✓

QA Methodologies

Agile/Scrum, BDD, TDD, Defect Lifecycle, UAT, Regression Testing

⚙

Tools & Platforms

JIRA, Azure DevOps, Git, Jenkins, Postman, SQL Server

🔬

Testing Types

Functional, Integration, Smoke, Sanity, API, Data Validation

⟳

CI/CD

GitHub Actions, Azure Pipelines, Jenkins workflows, automated test execution

📊

Data Engineering

SQL Server, BigQuery, Airflow, Kafka, dbt, data quality checks

👥

Collaboration

Sprint planning, standups, retrospectives, stakeholder communication

How I Work

A practical delivery approach built for fast-moving, high-risk product environments.

Risk-First Coverage

Prioritize business-critical paths first, then expand to regression depth using clear risk tiers.

CI Quality Gates

Shift checks left with smoke, API, and data validation gates that block risky releases early.

Data Reliability

Validate source-to-reporting accuracy with automated SQL checks, drift detection, and alerting.

Personal Projects

Hands-on automation and data projects demonstrating practical delivery impact.

E-Commerce Test Automation Suite

View repo

End-to-end Selenium and Playwright suite that validates core retail buying flows.

  • Automated 50+ critical scenarios (login, cart, checkout)
  • Integrated CI execution with result snapshots
  • Improved release confidence with repeatable regression evidence
PythonSeleniumPlaywright

REST API Testing Framework

View repo

Reusable API test framework using Postman collections and Python assertions.

  • Validated positive and negative REST API paths
  • Implemented JSON schema and contract checks
  • Published daily run reports for QA and product teams
PostmanPythonTesting

SQL Data Validation Utility

View repo

Python utility for validating warehouse records and reconciling transformed datasets.

  • Automated SQL checks for data quality and completeness
  • Flagged mismatches between source and reporting layers
  • Generated exportable run summaries for stakeholders
PythonSQLPandas

Market Risk Tracker

View repo

Portfolio risk monitoring workflow with rule-based alerts and daily snapshots.

  • Built position and exposure checks for high-risk assets
  • Added threshold alerts and trend visibility
  • Delivered a finance-friendly summary view
PythonSQLFinTech

Licenses & Certifications

Industry-recognized credentials validating QA, automation, and delivery expertise.

ISTQB Certified Tester, Foundation Level

ASTQB / ISTQB

Credential ID: CTFL-US-2024-1027

View credential

Selenium WebDriver with Python

Udemy

Advanced automation workflows, test design patterns, and framework scaling.

View credential

Fundamentals of Business Analysis

Udemy

Requirement breakdown, stakeholder communication, and QA-ready acceptance criteria.

View credential

Work Experience

Lyra × Alchelyst — QA Automation Engineer / Associate Director QA

  • Built and scaled a Playwright + PyTest framework for high-risk investor platform flows.
  • Integrated Azure DevOps pipelines to run automated quality gates on each release cycle.
  • Improved defect detection before UAT by shifting regression and API checks earlier.

Versant Media / NBC Sports Next — Data Engineer

  • Built Airflow DAGs and SQL Server pipelines supporting SLA-driven reporting delivery.
  • Implemented AWS S3 integrations and validation checks across multi-source datasets.
  • Reduced reporting risk with proactive quality checks on key business metrics.

Lukka — QA Data Engineer

  • Validated real-time crypto and financial data pipelines across Kafka and ETL workflows.
  • Automated reconciliation checks for source-to-target data movement.
  • Raised data quality confidence for downstream analytics and client-facing outputs.

BNY Mellon — Lead Analyst / Trade Processor / Business Analyst

  • Supported onboarding and trade processing operations in regulated financial workflows.
  • Improved reconciliation consistency through process controls and SQL-based automation.
  • Partnered with operations and stakeholders to reduce handoff errors and delays.

Contact

Let’s connect about QA automation, data engineering, and FinTech platform quality. I usually reply within 24 hours.

Email Me Request Resume PDF GitHub LinkedIn

© Jimmy Unelus

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:

About Skills Approach Projects Certifications Experience Contact

QA AUTOMATION • DATA ENGINEERING • FINTECH

Jimmy Unelus

Senior QA Automation Engineer

I help teams ship with confidence by building scalable test automation, API/data quality checks, and CI gates that reduce release risk in FinTech and regulated environments.

View Projects Request Resume GitHub LinkedIn

Open to Senior QA Automation, SDET, and QA/Data hybrid roles.

0

Years Experience

0

Automation Workstreams Delivered

0

Core Platforms Supported

About Me

I’m a Senior QA Automation and Data Engineer with 10+ years of experience across FinTech, media, and regulated environments. I specialize in Playwright, PyTest, Selenium, API testing, SQL, Airflow, CI/CD, and cloud-based test/data reliability.

Technical Expertise

🤖

QA Automation

Selenium WebDriver, Playwright, PyTest, Rest Assured, Cucumber BDD

</>

Languages

Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL, Bash, C#

✓

⚙

Tools & Platforms

JIRA, Azure DevOps, Git, Jenkins, Postman, SQL Server

🔬

Testing Types

Functional, Integration, Smoke, Sanity, API, Data Validation

⟳

GitHub Actions, Azure Pipelines, Jenkins workflows, automated test execution

📊

Data Engineering

SQL Server, BigQuery, Airflow, Kafka, dbt, data quality checks

👥

Collaboration

Sprint planning, standups, retrospectives, stakeholder communication

How I Work

A practical delivery approach built for fast-moving, high-risk product environments.

Risk-First Coverage

Prioritize business-critical paths first, then expand to regression depth using clear risk tiers.

CI Quality Gates

Shift checks left with smoke, API, and data validation gates that block risky releases early.

Data Reliability

Validate source-to-reporting accuracy with automated SQL checks, drift detection, and alerting.

Personal Projects

Hands-on automation and data projects demonstrating practical delivery impact.

E-Commerce Test Automation Suite

View repo

End-to-end Selenium and Playwright suite that validates core retail buying flows.

  • Automated 50+ critical scenarios (login, cart, checkout)
  • Integrated CI execution with result snapshots
  • Improved release confidence with repeatable regression evidence
PythonSeleniumPlaywright

REST API Testing Framework

View repo

Reusable API test framework using Postman collections and Python assertions.

  • Validated positive and negative REST API paths
  • Implemented JSON schema and contract checks
  • Published daily run reports for QA and product teams
PostmanPythonTesting

SQL Data Validation Utility

View repo

Python utility for validating warehouse records and reconciling transformed datasets.

  • Automated SQL checks for data quality and completeness
  • Flagged mismatches between source and reporting layers
  • Generated exportable run summaries for stakeholders
PythonSQLPandas

Market Risk Tracker

View repo

Portfolio risk monitoring workflow with rule-based alerts and daily snapshots.

  • Built position and exposure checks for high-risk assets
  • Added threshold alerts and trend visibility
  • Delivered a finance-friendly summary view
PythonSQLFinTech

Licenses & Certifications

Industry-recognized credentials validating QA, automation, and delivery expertise.

ISTQB Certified Tester, Foundation Level

ASTQB / ISTQB

Credential ID: CTFL-US-2024-1027

View credential

Professional Data Engineer Certification

Google Cloud

Issued by Google Cloud.

  • Evidence: Custom Evidence
  • Series ID: 45579
  • Certified As: Jimmy Unelus
  • Certification ID: 01b9b0b84db34c7ca18b6fd07df29a14

Work Experience

Lyra × Alchelyst — QA Automation Engineer / Associate Director QA

  • Built and scaled a Playwright + PyTest framework for high-risk investor platform flows.
  • Integrated Azure DevOps pipelines to run automated quality gates on each release cycle.
  • Improved defect detection before UAT by shifting regression and API checks earlier.

Versant Media / NBC Sports Next — Data Engineer

  • Built Airflow DAGs and SQL Server pipelines supporting SLA-driven reporting delivery.
  • Implemented AWS S3 integrations and validation checks across multi-source datasets.
  • Reduced reporting risk with proactive quality checks on key business metrics.

Lukka — QA Data Engineer

  • Validated real-time crypto and financial data pipelines across Kafka and ETL workflows.
  • Automated reconciliation checks for source-to-target data movement.
  • Raised data quality confidence for downstream analytics and client-facing outputs.

BNY Mellon — Lead Analyst / Trade Processor / Business Analyst

  • Supported onboarding and trade processing operations in regulated financial workflows.
  • Improved reconciliation consistency through process controls and SQL-based automation.
  • Partnered with operations and stakeholders to reduce handoff errors and delays.

Contact

Let’s connect about QA automation, data engineering, and FinTech platform quality. I usually reply within 24 hours.
